author: THSV StreamBridge
description: Copies creator-selected normalized public chat to one private Discord webhook through a bounded, privacy-gated Streamer.bot delivery action.
changelog: 2.4.0: aligned with the stable THSV StreamBridge 2.4.0 baseline, guided wizard UI, verified update metadata, and regenerated Streamer.bot imports. 1.0.0: initial disabled-by-default release with Twitch, YouTube, Kick, and TikTok support; exact bot and viewer ignore rules; command and simulation gates; bounded in-memory batching; Discord mention neutralization; creator-approved one-use relay delivery; and no local chat transcript or webhook storage.

manifest.name: Discord Chat Archive
installationSteps: Create a private Discord webhook for the archive channel and never share its URL.
Import the Discord Chat Archive Streamer.bot package, edit its webhook Set Argument, compile it, and run it manually once for a safe test.
Install this add-on, approve only the imported Deliver action, review the privacy notice and ignore list, then enable it.
uninstallationSteps: Uninstall the add-on. No chat transcript or webhook URL is stored by StreamBridge.

healthChecks.description: Confirms bounded public-chat filtering, batching, and approved Discord delivery are available.
